handlerCode: {() => { if (pulse.step < pulse.edges.length) { canvas.pulseEdge(pulse.edges[pulse.step], pulseDuration); pulse = { active: true, edges: pulse.edges, step: pulse.step + 1, currentEdge: pulse.edges[pulse.step] } } else { canvas.clearPulse(); pulse = { active: false, edges: pulse.edges, step: pulse.step, currentEdge: pulse.currentEdge } } }}
